parsed_review.summary: CP00-767 is a descriptor-only RP25 Migration Platform "UI workflow" closeout pack (40 units, RP25.P04.M03.S19-RP25.P04.M05.S14, risk B) reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob with full source inspection (no summary-only shortcut). Coverage is exact: deliverable distribution {claude_review:4, implementation:11, ui:18, security_audit:4, fixture:1, test:1, hermes_evidence:1}=40 matches MIGRATION_PLATFORM_CP767_REQUIREMENTS; coverage/descriptor validators (validators.js:996,:1024) and node --test cases (model.test.js:436-484) assert errors=[] and distribution equality. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are intact and enforced: MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:227) is spread into every descriptor/row, and validators reject runtime execution, raw/source/credential/real-client payloads, source-system/import runtime, UI runtime rendering (:1059), unauthorized count leak (:1060), and cross-tenant/audit/permission-body exposure. Authority boundary is correct: claude_is_final_approval=false, claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, with runtime opening deferred to CP00-768. Hermes packets are deterministic control-plane review/receipt only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false, receipt_shape=descriptor_only_migration_no_write) and are not embedded in product runtime. Command evidence shows all 16 commands at exit_code 0, including npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements/weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check, and build. The generated contract promotes latest_pack/latest_projection to MigrationPlatformCp767UiWorkflowDescriptor while retaining CP00-756..766 as historical, with validation.valid=true. Manifest production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, and the inspection/adjudication/claude-review-result artifacts are in pending_review; these are the expected pre-closeout placeholders to be resolved by acceptance of exactly this one valid hardened read-only receipt, not defects, and the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust overclaim. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer; this receipt enables, and does not block, CP00-767 closeout. No P0-P3 defects identified.
